papers_mined.title: Launeddas (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Sardinian polyphonic woodwind, three pipes: drone (tumbu) + melody (mancosa + mancosedda) playing in 3rds/6ths; circular breathing for continuous phase-locked output.

papers_mined.title: Launeddas Organology
papers_mined.note: Three idioglot single-reed pipes; specialized circular breathing enables uninterrupted phase coherence between drone + melody pipes.

papers_mined.title: Launeddas Britannica
papers_mined.note: Three-pipe instrument with sustained drone reference; 8th BCE Nuragic origin; player synchronizes melody pipes against drone phase-anchor.

papers_mined.title: Launeddas Prehistoric Sound Sardinia
papers_mined.note: Three-reed polyphonic; continuous circular-breathing technique sustains drone-melody phase relationship.

papers_mined.title: TransMLA Multi-Head Latent Attention (2502.07864)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: decoupled RoPE positional embedding + latent features as shared KV head interacting with all query/output heads; synchronized multi-head attention via shared reference embedding.

papers_mined.title: DuoAttention Retrieval Streaming Heads (2410.10819)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: dual-channel attention with retrieval heads + streaming heads; shared continuous attention-sink anchor for streaming.

papers_mined.title: Enabling DeepSeek MLA Any Architecture (ACL 2025)
